questionHtml:
Which contain delocalised electrons?

I.   C6H5OH
II.  CH3COO−
III. CO32−

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which contain delocalised electrons? I. C6H5OHII. CH3COO−III. CO32− A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
breadcrumbLabels: 14.1 Covalent bonding and electron domain and molecular geometries
